description: The BMW M4, produced from 2014, split from the M3 lineage as the two-door coupe and convertible variant. The F82 generation produced 425-444 bhp, while the G82 increased to 473-543 bhp in CSL form. The ultra-limited M4 CSL with its carbon roof and manual-delete weight saving is the ultimate version.
